hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qEi "rm\s+-(r|f|rf|fr)\s+(/|~|\$HOME)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Destructive delete. Use trash or move to tmp instead." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qEi "(^|[&|;(])[[:space:]]*git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+.*\b(main|master|production)([[:space:];|&)]|$)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Direct push to protected branch. Use a feature branch and PR." >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qEi "curl\s.*\|\s*(bash|sh|zsh)|wget\s.*\|\s*(bash|sh|zsh)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Pipe-to-shell detected. Download first, inspect, then execute." >&2; exit 2; fi'
